name: DynaVap - The B2
summary: A durable butane-heated dry-herb vaporiser in medical-grade stainless steel and silicone, for everyday use.
description: The DynaVap B2 is a torch-heated dry-herb vaporiser built from medical-grade stainless steel and food-safe silicone for daily, knock-about use. It needs no battery and produces clean, combustion-free vapour that brings out the flavour of dried flower. The compact build is pocketable and discreet, and it conserves material well, making it efficient for regular medicating. As with all DynaVaps you will need a butane torch (sold separately) and a short learning curve to find your rhythm — the reward is a robust device with nothing to charge.
